context: This policy governs freelance business expense reimbursement for Sarah Henderson Design. All expenses must be directly related to client work or business operations.

validation_rules.notes: Receipt or invoice required for all software subscriptions.
Single expenses over $200 require a brief business justification note.
Expenses must be submitted within 60 days of purchase date.
validation_rules.requirement: Submission within 60 days of expense date

validation_rules.notes: Personal purchases not related to client projects or business operations are not reimbursable.
validation_rules.requirement: Expense directly tied to business activity
